title: gardenia buffalina
intro: Gardenia buffalina, also known as Fangji, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-oxidative effects, and is used to treat a variety of health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Gardenia buffalina include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and modulating immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Gardenia buffalina include extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
